## Source: ghsa-malware (e316c6b5bac93c4de2b3592fabfc20f498f048f1366fb7575ba18433f5020ce3)
## Source: ossf-package-analysis (d523f79a74314c8419942e259c5fc48634c3e75a90de8e0337b430df5a28392e)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'mvnd' @ 99.99.99 (rubygems) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
